assembly_context.name: FourAxisIndustrialArm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 创建一个工业风四轴机械臂装配体，包含底座、回转台、3个通用关节叉、2个通用连杆、3个销轴和1个夹爪。所有零件基于默认尺寸参数化建模，并通过同轴和重合配合进行装配。初始姿态为竖直向上伸展（修正：为避免奇异点，肩关节设为90度水平伸出，其余关节伸直）。
design_rules: Unit: mm for dimensions, convert to m for API calls if necessary.
Fillet R2 on all exposed sharp edges.
Clearance fit: Pin D18mm into Hole D20mm.

instances.name: Shoulder Hinge Pin
instances.instance_role: Connects Shoulder Fork and Upper Arm
instances.placement_notes: Inserted into Shoulder Fork and Upper Arm Start.

instances.name: Elbow Hinge Pin
instances.placement_notes: Inserted into Elbow Fork and Forearm Start.

instances.name: Wrist Hinge Pin
instances.placement_notes: Inserted into Wrist Fork and Gripper.

assembly_sequence: Mate inst_yaw_turntable to inst_base_plate (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_joint_fork_shoulder to inst_yaw_turntable (Face Coincident + Axis Concentric)
Mate inst_hollow_link_1 to inst_joint_fork_shoulder (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_elbow to inst_hollow_link_1 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_hollow_link_2 to inst_joint_fork_elbow (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_joint_fork_wrist to inst_hollow_link_2 (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)
Mate inst_simple_gripper to inst_joint_fork_wrist (Axis Concentric + Plane Coincident + Angle Constraint)

part.name: Hinge Pin
part.function: Connects Joint Forks and Links, allows rotation
part.material_or_notes: Steel. Hardened. Fillet R1 on ends.
assembly_relation_notes: Inserted into Joint Fork Hinge Hole and Link Hinge Boss.
Axis concentric with Fork Hinge Axis and Link Hinge Axis.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch circle D18 on XY plane.
